description_long: This is a small, stylized windmill with a dark brown, wooden exterior and a simple, polygonal structure. The windmill features a four-bladed rotor attached to the front, with each blade constructed from flat, rectangular wooden planks. The main body is a tapered, hexagonal tower with visible wooden paneling and a pitched roof, also made of wood. A small, square window with a grid pattern is present on one side of the tower, adding a touch of architectural detail. The overall design is compact and rustic, suitable for placement in parks, gardens, or as a decorative feature in urban environments. The surface appears smooth with a slightly glossy finish, suggesting a varnished or lacquered wood material.
description: A compact, dark brown wooden windmill with four flat blades, a hexagonal tower, and a pitched roof, featuring a small window on one side. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a polished, decorative appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pitched roof, the edge of the four-bladed rotor, and the hexagonal tower body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full four-bladed rotor and the symmetrical, pointed roof above the tower.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pitched roof, partial view of the rotor, and a small window visible on the tower.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the pitched roof, the hexagonal tower, and the small window on the side.
